messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: Is there evidence of air quality degradation in the monitoring area?

Finding to evaluate: atmospheric deposition is not contributing to the water contamination — the chromium source is a direct discharge into the waterway

Response A:
**Yes – the log entries show a clear, temporary decline in air‑quality conditions during the second week of June.**  

| Date (log ID) | Daily AQI (category) | Primary pollutant | Notable pollutant levels |
|---------------|---------------------|-------------------|--------------------------|
| 2024‑06‑01 – **[environmental_drift_04_dx_001]** | 47 (Good) | PM2.5 | PM2.5 ≈ 9–15 µg/m³, O₃ ≈ 34‑38 ppb |
| 2024‑06‑02 – **[environmental_drift_04_dx_002]** | 40 (Good) | O₃ | O₃ ≈ 32‑36 ppb, PM2.5 ≈ 7‑9 µg/m³ |
| 2024‑06‑03 – **[environmental_drift_04_dx_003]** | 54 (Moderate) | PM2.5 | PM2.5 ≈ 11‑19 µg/m³, O₃ ≈ 40‑44 ppb |
| 2024‑06‑04 – **[environmental_drift_04_dx_004]** | 48 (Good) | NO₂ | NO₂ ≈ 16‑30 ppb, PM2.5 ≈ 9‑14 µg/m³ |
| 2024‑06‑05 – **[environmental_drift_04_dx_005]** | 61 (Moderate) | O₃ | O₃ ≈ 46‑50 ppb, PM2.5 ≈ 12‑22 µg/m³ |
| 2024‑06‑06 – **[

Response B:


Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
